topic: Claude Now Lives Inside Excel and Word

caption.hook: Claude just moved into the two apps you already live in: Excel and Word.
caption.summary: Anthropic put Claude directly inside Microsoft's docs and spreadsheets — so instead of copy-pasting between a chatbot and your files, the AI now works in the file with you. Here's what people are actually doing with it.
caption.content:
• Building and fixing spreadsheet formulas by describing them in plain English
• Turning a messy sheet into a clean summary, chart or pivot in seconds
• Drafting and rewriting Word docs — reports, emails, contracts — in-line, keeping your formatting
caption.cta: Save this so you can try it, then tell me: which one would you use first? Follow @genzcapital for real AI use cases every week. No fluff. No hype.

slides.headline: CLAUDE NOW LIVES INSIDE EXCEL AND WORD
slides.subheadline: 3 real ways people are using it in their own files
slides.prompt: A dramatic dark cinematic hero shot of a laptop on a desk glowing in near-black, its screen filled with a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet grid of numbers and a Microsoft Word document beside it, a single neon-green glow emanating from the screen as if an AI is working inside the files. The Excel green icon and the Word blue icon float subtly as light sources. Empty clean near-black space across the bottom 40% for a headline. One focal point, moody rim lighting, no people, no text anywhere in the image.

slides.headline: FORMULAS IN PLAIN ENGLISH
slides.body: Describe what you want — "flag every row over budget" — and Claude writes the Excel formula and explains it, right in the cell.
slides.prompt: A close-up cinematic shot of a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet on a screen in near-black surroundings, one cell glowing neon green showing a formula being written automatically (=IF...), rows of budget numbers with one row highlighted in neon green as if flagged by an AI. A soft neon-green cursor glow. Dark moody background, one clear focal point on the highlighted formula cell, no people, no watermark, no text captions overlaid — just the spreadsheet UI.

slides.headline: MESSY SHEET TO CLEAN SUMMARY
slides.body: Point it at a raw export and it groups, totals and turns rows into a readable summary or chart — no manual pivots.
slides.prompt: A cinematic dark close-up of a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet on a screen in near-black surroundings, showing a messy chaotic block of raw data on the left visually transforming into a clean, organized neon-green bar chart and a tidy summary table on the right, with a soft neon-green glow and a subtle arrow of light flowing from the messy data toward the clean chart, as if an AI reorganized it. Moody teal-and-black grade, one clear focal point on the clean chart, no people, no faces, no watermark, no readable text captions — just the spreadsheet and chart UI.

slides.headline: DRAFT AND REWRITE IN WORD
slides.body: Inside Word it drafts reports and emails, tightens your writing and keeps your formatting — no copy-paste from a separate chatbot.
slides.prompt: A cinematic dark close-up of a Microsoft Word document on a screen in near-black surroundings, showing a clean page of a professional report being written automatically, with a few lines glowing neon green as if an AI is drafting and tightening the text in real time, a soft neon-green cursor glow and the blue Word icon subtly floating as a light source. Moody teal-and-black grade, shallow depth of field, one clear focal point on the glowing paragraph, no people, no faces, no watermark, no readable text — the document text is blurred/illegible lorem-style lines only.

slides.headline: Save this — you'll want to try #1
